{{Infobox location
| name = Samara
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Samara]] has a ring of light that glows white and illuminates the valley.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Samara]] is a location near a range of mountains.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Rocks and ice tumbled down from [[Samara]]'s peak.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
